title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : changements de stationnement
instructions: Lisez la note de service et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
To: All Employees
From: Facilities Management
Subject: Temporary Parking Changes

Due to construction work in the main parking lot, parking spaces {{1}} be limited starting next Monday.

Employees are encouraged to use public transportation or carpool {{2}} possible during this period.

A temporary parking area has been set up behind the warehouse, {{3}} is about a ten-minute walk from the main entrance.

We expect the construction to be completed within {{4}} weeks, and we will notify you once normal parking is restored.

questions.explanation: Le changement débute "starting next Monday" : futur passif, "will be limited".
Expression figée : "whenever possible" (chaque fois que c'est possible).
Pronom relatif pour une chose ("a temporary parking area") : "which".
